locations.name: Outpost Dorn
locations.description: A remote mining outpost on the edge of the sector. The rebel cell's first foothold.

bonuses.description: Mining contacts provide a small but steady income.

locations.name: Checkpoint Aurek
locations.description: An Imperial checkpoint controlling access to the inner sector. Intelligence flows through here.

locations.name: Xylo Pass
locations.description: A treacherous mountain pass connecting the outer and inner sectors. Strategic chokepoint.

bonuses.description: Secure passage allows allied reinforcements during missions.

locations.name: Tangrene City
locations.description: The sector capital. Dense urban sprawl with extensive Imperial presence and underground contacts.

bonuses.description: Urban black market offers military-grade armor.

locations.name: The Shadow Market
locations.description: A hidden bazaar run by the criminal underworld. Rare goods at dangerous prices.

bonuses.description: Access to illegal weapons through syndicate connections.

locations.name: The Broker's Palace
locations.description: Headquarters of the Shadow Syndicate. Heavily fortified and full of secrets.

bonuses.description: Insider knowledge of syndicate defense layouts.

locations.name: Trandoshan Hunting Grounds
locations.description: Wild frontier territory controlled by Trandoshan hunters. Dangerous but resourceful.

bonuses.description: Trandoshan mercenaries available as combat reinforcements.
Hunters provide early warning of enemy movement.

locations.name: Drayen's Reach
locations.description: The warlord's forward staging area. Establishing a foothold here is critical for the final assault.

bonuses.description: Reconnaissance reveals Drayen's prototype war machine locations.
Disrupting supply lines weakens Drayen's forces significantly.

locations.name: Fortress Drayen
locations.description: The warlord's final stronghold. Only accessible with a fully established network.

bonuses.description: Direct assault on the fortress becomes viable.
